prompt: People burning enormous piles of paper currency for warmth in a ruined city square. Brutalist concrete towers loom in the background, dark and powerless. A single loaf of bread sits on a pedestal with a price tag showing an absurdly long number. The portraits of dead leaders on the burning notes seem to smirk. 70s dystopian surrealism. The feeling is: they printed money to fund wars until the money stopped working.
